name: Filter Example One Mainline 5-Var Lowcost FixHeight

variables.name: outer_resonator_width
variables.description: Low-cost fixheight PPO variable. Shared electrical-length proxy for resonators 1 and 3.

variables.name: middle_resonator_width
variables.description: Low-cost fixheight PPO variable. Electrical-length proxy for resonator 2.

variables.name: adjacent_coupling_gap
variables.description: Low-cost fixheight PPO variable. Shared vertical gap controlling adjacent coupling strength.

variables.name: cross_coupling_gap
variables.description: Low-cost fixheight PPO variable. Horizontal gap for the non-adjacent coupling path.

variables.name: feed_offset
variables.description: Low-cost fixheight PPO variable. Shared feed-line coupling position used as the external-Q proxy.
